ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Krishna Defence and Allied Industries Limited's 13th Annual General Meeting focused on significant governance and leadership continuity, re-appointing its Managing Director and two Independent Directors, and appointing a new Whole-time Director to strengthen operations. Materially, shareholders were approved a 12.5% final dividend for FY 2025-26, indicating positive financial performance. While the specific details of the approved alterations to the Memorandum and Articles of Association are not provided, no immediate red flags are apparent regarding the disclosed director appointments or dividend declaration.
